info.title: GOLDEN API Documentation
info.description: Complete REST API for IPTV subscription management (Lines, MAGs, Active Codes)

post.description: Create a single inactive activation code. The code is generated automatically and can later be activated by end users on the specified device type. All bouquets from the selected package will be automatically used based on the is_adult parameter.

403.description: Forbidden - You do not have permission to create activation codes

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

post.description: Extend an activated active code subscription with a new package. The code must be activated first. The new package cannot be a trial or paid trial package.

package_id.description: ID of the new package to extend with

404.description: Active code not found or not activated

403.description: Forbidden - You do not have permission to extend this active code

422.description: Validation error or invalid package (trial/paid trial or not allowed for your role)

post.description: Refund an activated active code subscription, optionally refunding all subscription history (mass refund). The code must be activated first.

mass_refund.description: Whether to refund all subscription history

404.description: Active code not found or not activated

403.description: Forbidden - You do not have permission to refund this active code

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific activation code including bouquets. If the code is activated, also includes subscription details, subscription history, and online activity. The code must belong to the authenticated user.

username.description: Only returned if the code is activated

password.description: Only returned if the code is activated

dns_link.description: Only returned if the code is activated

subscription.description: Subscription details if code is activated

403.description: Forbidden - You do not have permission to view this activation code

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

post.summary: Create a new M3U line subscription
post.description: Create a single M3U line subscription with the provided username and password. All bouquets from the selected package will be automatically used based on the is_adult parameter.

username.description: Username for the line (must be unique)

max_connections.description: Maximum number of simultaneous connections allowed

403.description: Forbidden - You do not have permission to create lines

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

post.description: Extend a line subscription with a new package. The new package cannot be a trial or paid trial package.

package_id.description: ID of the new package to extend with

403.description: Forbidden - You do not have permission to extend this line

422.description: Validation error or invalid package (trial/paid trial)

post.description: Refund a line subscription, optionally refunding all subscription history (mass refund).

mass_refund.description: Whether to refund all subscription history

403.description: Forbidden - You do not have permission to refund this line

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific M3U line subscription including bouquets, subscription history, and online activity. The subscription must belong to the authenticated user.

403.description: Forbidden - You do not have permission to view this line

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

post.summary: Create a new MAG device subscription
post.description: Create a single MAG device subscription with a MAC address. All bouquets from the selected package will be automatically used based on the is_adult parameter.

422.description: Validation error or duplicate MAC address

403.description: Forbidden - You do not have permission to create MAG devices

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

post.description: Extend a MAG device subscription with a new package. The new package cannot be a trial or paid trial package.

package_id.description: ID of the new package to extend with

403.description: Forbidden - You do not have permission to extend this MAG device

422.description: Validation error or invalid package (trial/paid trial or not allowed for your role)

post.description: Refund a MAG device subscription, optionally refunding all subscription history (mass refund).

mass_refund.description: Whether to refund all subscription history

403.description: Forbidden - You do not have permission to refund this MAG device

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific MAG device subscription including bouquets, subscription history, and online activity. The subscription must belong to the authenticated user.

403.description: Forbidden - You do not have permission to view this MAG device

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of packages accessible to the authenticated user with filtering, searching, and sorting capabilities

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term to filter packages by name or ID

passed_days.description: Number of days after which this policy applies

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

api_key.description: Toutes les routes API nécessitent un token d'authentification. Vous pouvez générer votre token depuis votre tableau de bord.
api_key.name: X-API-Key
